landing.heroTagline: Personal astrology readings built on natal chart data
landing.heroHeadline: Your natal chart is not a horoscope. It's your structure.
landing.heroSubheadline: Clario computes planet positions, houses, and aspects from your exact birth data, then AI turns that into a readable personal reading. Not vague generalities — precise astrology data + deep interpretation.
landing.howSubtitle: Four steps from birth date to personal reading
landing.howStep1Desc: Date, time (unknown time is supported), city and country. Your data is stored encrypted and belongs to you only.
landing.howStep2Desc: A deterministic astrology engine calculates 10 planets, houses, ascendant, midheaven, and aspects — without AI involvement.
landing.howStep3Desc: Based on the computed chart, a structured text is generated: summary, sections, key placements, and guidance. Saved to your library.
landing.howStep4Desc: Continue the conversation in a chat scoped to the specific reading. AI knows your chart and answers in context.
landing.featuresTitle: Why Clario, not a regular horoscope
landing.featuresSubtitle: Facts are calculated, not invented — AI in Clario interprets, not fabricates
landing.feat1Desc: Planet positions, houses, and aspects are computed by an astronomy engine, not generated by AI. Every reading can be traced back to the chart.
landing.feat2Desc: Natal overview, personality, love, career, strengths, finances, health, transits, and compatibility.
landing.feat3Desc: Visual SVG wheel: zodiac, planets, houses, aspects — all on one screen.
landing.feat4Desc: All readings are saved and stay accessible. Return to a reading a week later and read it again.
landing.feat5Desc: Birth data is stored encrypted, accessible only to you. AI receives only astrological chart data, not personal information.
landing.feat6Desc: Ask clarifying questions about a specific reading. AI knows your chart and answers precisely in context.
landing.faq1Q: Why do I need to know my birth time?
landing.faq1A: Birth time determines the ascendant, midheaven, and house placement of planets. Without time, the chart is built, but house-sensitive readings are limited. Clario flags this explicitly.
landing.faq2Q: Do I need to know astrology?
landing.faq2A: No. Clario explains placements, signs, and aspects in plain language. The reading is understandable without special knowledge — just ask if something is unclear.
landing.faq3A: Birth data is encrypted and accessible only to you. The AI model only receives astrological chart data, not personal details. The operating principles are described in the privacy policy.
landing.faq4A: Clario is currently free within a free-tier limit. We don't hide features behind a subscription — just create an account and start.
landing.faq5Q: Can I create a chart for another person?
landing.faq5A: Yes — a partner, child, or client. When creating a chart, choose the type ‘Another person’ or ‘Partner’. Compatibility readings are planned.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Create an account and get your first reading in a few minutes.

privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Clario ("we", "our", or "us") collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our astrology service.
privacy.section1Body: When you register, we collect your email address and optional display name. If you authenticate via Telegram, we receive the Telegram account identifier needed to link your workspace. We store birth details, chart preferences, generated chart snapshots, readings, and essential account activity needed to provide the service.
privacy.section2Body: We use your information to authenticate your account, compute natal charts, generate AI-assisted readings, and send transactional emails such as verification and password reset messages. We do not use your data for advertising and we never sell it to third parties.
privacy.section3Body: Structured chart inputs and reading prompts are sent to our AI model provider (Qwen) to generate interpretations. The model provider receives only the data required for the reading workflow. Please review Alibaba Cloud's privacy policy if you have concerns about model processing.
privacy.section4Body: Your data is stored in Supabase (PostgreSQL) hosted on secure cloud infrastructure. We use industry-standard encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. Access to production data is restricted to authorised personnel only.
privacy.section5Body: We use two cookies: a session cookie to keep you signed in, and a language preference cookie (NEXT_LOCALE) to remember your chosen interface language. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.
privacy.section6Body: We rely on the following third-party services and infrastructure: Supabase (database and authentication), Vercel (hosting), Qwen (AI reading generation, Alibaba Cloud), Resend for transactional email, and Telegram for linked access when connected. Each provider or service has its own privacy policy governing how it handles data.
privacy.section7Body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. You can delete your account at any time from the Settings page. Upon deletion, your saved charts, generated readings, linked workspace metadata, and usage records are permanently removed from our systems within 30 days unless a longer retention period is required by law.
privacy.section8Body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data, or to request a copy of it. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at the email address below.
privacy.section9Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or an in-app notice. The "last updated" date at the top of this page will always reflect the most recent version.
privacy.section10Body: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using Clario. By creating an account or using the service, you agree to be bound by these terms.
terms.section1Body: These Terms of Service ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Clario. If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the service.
terms.section2Body: Clario is an AI-powered astrology workspace. You can create chart profiles from birth data, generate deterministic chart snapshots, receive structured readings, and access parts of the service through the web app and optional Telegram integration.
terms.section3Body: You must provide a valid email address to register. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. You must be at least 13 years of age to use the service.
terms.section4Body: You agree not to upload content that is illegal, harmful, defamatory, infringing, or that violates any third-party rights. You agree not to reverse-engineer the AI generation pipeline or use the service to generate content at scale for redistribution. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these rules.
terms.section5Body: The service has usage limits that may vary based on account type and current capacity. Limits may include chart creation, saved chart storage, reading generation, and related premium features. Limits reset on a rolling 30-day basis unless the app explicitly states otherwise.
terms.section6Body: You retain ownership of the data and content you provide. By using the service, you grant us a limited licence to process birth details, chart data, and related prompts for the purpose of generating readings on your behalf. Generated readings are associated with your account and may be exported or deleted by you subject to the product's capabilities.
terms.section7Body: Astrology readings are generated with the assistance of AI models and may contain inaccuracies, omissions, or interpretations you disagree with. They are provided for informational and reflective purposes only and are not medical, legal, financial, or psychological advice.
terms.section8Body: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free from harmful components.
terms.section9Body: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of the service, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.section10Body: We may suspend or terminate your access to the service at any time for violation of these Terms. You may close your account at any time from the Settings page. Upon termination, your data will be deleted as described in our Privacy Policy.
terms.section11Body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notice. Continued use of the service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.section12Body: These Terms are governed by applicable law. Disputes shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation first, and failing that, through binding arbitration or courts of competent jurisdiction.
terms.section13Body: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
